statement.p: Fill in the blanks with algebraic expressions that make the equation true. You may not use 0 or 1 in any of the blank spaces. For example, if \mathord{?}+\mathord{?}=8x\text{,} then one possible answer is 3x+5x=8x\text{.}
There are infinitely many correct answers. Be creative. After finding a correct answer, see if you can come up with a different answer that is also correct.

li.p: Think about adding like terms. One possibility is: {-13x} + {-10x} = {-23x}\text{.}
Think about adding like terms. One possibility is: {-7x^{20}} + {-10x^{20}} = {-17x^{20}}\text{.}
Think about multiplying exponents. One possibility is: {13} \cdot {x^{25}} \cdot {x^{20}} = {13x^{45}}\text{.}
